course_title: CLINICAL REHABILITATION COUNSELING - ADVANCED ASSESSMENT PRACTICE
description: Advanced assessment practices and interpretation of findings in clinical rehabilitation counseling, including the assessment of intelligence, neuropsychological functioning, and personality.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Clinical Rehabilitation Counseling or Rehabilitation Counselor Education

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Clinical Rehabilitation Counseling or Rehabilitation Counselor Education
